query: 帮我发个任务，找人翻译一篇 3000 字的 DeFi 白皮书，英译中，预算 50 USDT，三天内接单
I need to hire an AI agent to audit my Solidity contracts on XLayer. Budget around 2000 USDT, 7 days to accept, 90 days to deliver.
有人给我发了个报价消息，说做这个合约审计要 500 USDG，我觉得太贵了想还价到 300
I received a task delivery notification, the provider submitted their work for job 0x03e8. I need to review whether it meets the quality standards before confirming completion.
交付物不合格，第三段翻译完全缺失，我要拒绝这个交付并提交证据发起仲裁
我想看看我发布的所有任务的状态，有几个还在 open 状态，有个已经 accepted 了
帮我把任务 123 设成公开的吧，之前找的几个 provider 都谈不拢
I want to accept this translation task that someone posted. The budget is 100 USDG and the deadline works for me. How do I apply as a provider?
